subject: Vullaby — small fluffy bird-like creature with bone cup around its lower body, perched in desert canyon setting
description: A small, fluffy bird-like creature with a large head and tiny body perches in a desert or canyon environment. Its lower body is enclosed in a bone-like cupped structure. Red rock formations and a dry blue sky fill the background. The creature has small wings and a round, disheveled fluffy appearance. Its expression appears alert or slightly grumpy.
foreground: small fluffy bird creature, bone cup enclosing lower body, perched
background: red rock canyon, dry desert landscape, blue sky
